{{Infobox character
| name = Oth’kimeth
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|the Conqueror}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

''See also: [[Oth’kimeth Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Oth’kimeth, also known as the Conqueror, is a powerful entity classified as a [[Fiend]]. Originally designated as a [[Class Two Fiend]] during an invasion of an [[Iteration]], its status was elevated to Class One after it began feeding. The entity is characterized by a desire for conquest and an ambition to destroy the [[Abidan]], specifically aiming to cause their collapse by infiltrating locations such as [[Haven]], [[Cradle]], or [[Sanctum]]. Physically, the [[Fiend]] can manifest as a large, semi-physical form featuring a crown of bone spikes and crimson eyes. It has also been described as a demonic figure with horns arranged into a blood-tipped crown. To combat the threat, [[Daruman]] chose to seal Oth’kimeth within himself, acting as a vessel to contain the creature. This containment resulted in [[Daruman]] spending centuries imprisoned within an [[Abidan]] prison-world, a period that eventually led the [[Court]] to label him [[the Mad King]] due to the [[Fiend]]'s corrupting influence on his will. [[The Mad King]]’s physical appearance was altered by this union, as he wore armor constructed from the bones of Oth’kimeth's physical body. The [[Fiend]] maintains a presence within its host, capable of influencing thoughts, mocking [[Daruman]] with memories of past defeats, and exerting pressure on surrounding environments. Oth’kimeth has also demonstrated the ability to separate from its human vessel, creating rifts into the Void.}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Daruman]] sealed [[Oth’kimeth]] inside himself.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Oth’kimeth]] is a [[Fiend]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Known as the Conqueror, Oth’kimeth is a demonic figure characterized by horns that form a blood-tipped crown and a single blazing red eye. This [[Fiend]] once shared moments of laughter with [[Daruman]], though it is ultimately revealed to be a [[Fiend]] sealed within [[the Mad King]]. While Oth’kimeth exists as a presence inside [[Daruman]], it possesses the ability to separate from him.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Oth’kimeth]] laughed with [[Daruman]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Oth’kimeth]] is a [[Fiend]] inside [[the Mad King]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Oth’kimeth]] has a blazing red eye.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Oth’kimeth]] is a [[Fiend]] sealed inside [[Daruman]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Oth’kimeth]] is a [[Fiend]] that can separate from [[Daruman]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Oth’kimeth]] is known as the Conqueror.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Oth’kimeth]] is a demonic figure with horns arranged into a blood-tipped crown.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Oth’kimeth]] is a hulking semi-physical form crowned in spikes of bone.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20">''Dreadgod'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Oth’kimeth]] is a [[Fiend]] that escaped while [[Suriel]] was in the Void.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
